nasb.text: At the sound of the tumult peoples flee; At the lifting up of Yourself nations disperse.

esv.text: At the tumultuous noise peoples flee; when you lift yourself up, nations are scattered,

cnv.text: 喧嚷的聲音一發，眾民必逃跑； 你一興起，列國就四散。

ccb.text: 你大喊一声，列邦都奔逃； 你一站起来，列国都溃散。

csbs.text: 轰然之声一发，万民就奔逃； 你一兴起，列国就四散。
